title: NonConflictKeys
description: Make keybindings with the same input key no longer conflict
body:
# Introduction
NonConflictKeys is an independent implementation of the same name feature in [Modern KeyBinding](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernkeybinding).

# Feature
The keybindings with the same key will all be activated if the key is pressed.

# ATTENTION
You **DEFINITELY CAN** add the mod to your modpack.
